<Heading
  as={"h1"}
  className={"openapi__heading"}
  children={"Get commissions for a referral"}
>
</Heading>

<MethodEndpoint
  method={"get"}
  path={"/api/programs/{program_id}/promoters/{promoter_id}/referrals/{contact_id}"}
  context={"endpoint"}
>
  
</MethodEndpoint>



Fetches commissions of a single referral.
